levels.title: Beginner
levels.subtitle: ChatGPT beyond search — everyday tasks with natural language

cards.title: Plan my groceries from a receipt photo
cards.description: Watch someone upload a grocery receipt photo and get a full 3-day meal plan with a shopping list for missing ingredients.
cards.creator: Skill Leap AI
cards.tryItPrompt: I have a photo of my grocery receipt. Analyze what I bought, suggest a 3-day meal plan using those ingredients, and list what extra I might need.
cards.copyPrompt: I have a photo of my grocery receipt. Analyze what I bought, suggest a 3-day meal plan using those ingredients, and list what extra I might need.

cards.title: How to use ChatGPT to summarize a PDF (2026 Full Guide)
cards.description: See ChatGPT read a 20-page work document and return exactly 5 bullet points covering everything that matters.
cards.creator: Tutorials With Alex
cards.tryItPrompt: I'm going to paste a document. Please summarize it into exactly 5 bullet points covering the key takeaways.
cards.copyPrompt: I'm going to paste a document. Please summarize it into exactly 5 bullet points covering the key takeaways.

cards.title: Write a professional email declining a meeting
cards.description: Watch ChatGPT draft a polished, friendly decline email in under 10 seconds from a simple one-line request.
cards.creator: Matt Wolfe
cards.tryItPrompt: Write a professional but friendly email declining a meeting invite. Make it respectful and suggest an alternative time or approach.
cards.copyPrompt: Write a professional but friendly email declining a meeting invite. Make it respectful and suggest an alternative time or approach.

levels.title: Intermediate
levels.subtitle: Simple AI delegation — Claude handles file and browser tasks for you

cards.title: Clean up my Downloads folder
cards.description: Watch Claude organize a chaotic Downloads folder by file type, create subfolders, and move everything into place — no manual sorting.
cards.creator: Anthropic
cards.tryItPrompt: Please organize my Downloads folder by grouping files by type, creating subfolders, and moving files into the right place. Ask before deleting anything.
cards.copyPrompt: Please organize my Downloads folder by grouping files by type, creating subfolders, and moving files into the right place. Ask before deleting anything.

cards.title: Book a restaurant for tonight
cards.description: See Claude browse the web, find an Italian restaurant with tonight availability, and complete the booking — start to finish.
cards.creator: Anthropic
cards.tryItPrompt: Find a well-reviewed Italian restaurant near me that has availability tonight for 2 people at 7:30 PM and book it. Show me the options before confirming.
cards.copyPrompt: Find a well-reviewed Italian restaurant near me that has availability tonight for 2 people at 7:30 PM and book it. Show me the options before confirming.

cards.title: Fill out this expense form for me
cards.description: Watch Claude open a web form, read the fields, and fill in all the details from shared receipts — one command, whole form done.
cards.creator: Anthropic
cards.tryItPrompt: I need to fill out a form online. Here's the URL and my information. Please open the form, fill in my details, and show me a preview before submitting.
cards.copyPrompt: I need to fill out a form online. Here's the URL and my information. Please open the form, fill in my details, and show me a preview before submitting.

levels.title: Advanced
levels.subtitle: Full AI agents — multi-step workflows from raw inputs to polished outputs

cards.title: Turn my receipts into an expense report
cards.description: Watch Claude read a pile of receipt photos, extract dates, vendors, and amounts, then produce a formatted expense report ready to submit.
cards.creator: Anthropic
cards.tryItPrompt: I have photos of work trip receipts. Please extract the date, vendor, amount, and category from each one and create a formatted expense report I can submit.
cards.copyPrompt: I have photos of work trip receipts. Please extract the date, vendor, amount, and category from each one and create a formatted expense report I can submit.

cards.title: Research the top trends and build a summary dashboard
cards.description: See Perplexity pull live sources, synthesize the top 3 remote-work trends, and produce a one-page summary dashboard with citations.
cards.creator: Perplexity AI
cards.tryItPrompt: Research the top 3 trends in remote work for 2025, find what experts and employees are saying, and build me a one-page summary dashboard with sources.
cards.copyPrompt: Research the top 3 trends in remote work for 2025, find what experts and employees are saying, and build me a one-page summary dashboard with sources.

cards.title: Find the best flights and compare them in a table
cards.description: Watch an AI agent search live flight data across multiple routes and return a clean comparison table — price, duration, layovers — in one shot.
cards.creator: Perplexity AI
cards.tryItPrompt: Find the best flights from NYC to Tokyo in April under $1200 and compare them in a table showing price, total duration, number of stops, and airline.
cards.copyPrompt: Find the best flights from NYC to Tokyo in April under $1200 and compare them in a table showing price, total duration, number of stops, and airline.
